title: Neeyum Ada Naanum Lyrics Vil Ambu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song:Neeyum Ada Naanum - Vil Ambu,
Movie:Vil Ambu,
Singer:D Imman,
Singer:AV Pooja,

Ennaachu ennamo aachu
Yenaku puriyalaye edhvum
Thala keezha kavuthutta saachu
Unaku theriyudha adhuvum
Nenachu paakula siricha paakula
Valichi potta un kanaala

Paartha nodiyula potta pidiyula
Maatha mudiyila ennaala
Hey neeyum adi naanum onna serndha
Vera edhuvum enaku venaa
Adhu podhum adhu podhum
Neeyum ada naanum onna serndha
Manam sirakadikumey
Edhuvum venaa enaku adhu podhum

Paathathum illa
Padithathum illa
Pazhakamum illa
Kadhal pudhusu enaku puriyadhey
Arivayum vena vena
Anubavam vena
Adhu varum thaana

Adhuku varambu muraye kidayadhu
Aambala manasule aani dhan adikure
Angadhan padamena thongidhan sirikure
Nasungama manankasangaama enna maatitey

Hey neeyum adi naanum onna serndha
Vera edhuvum enaku venaa
Adhu podhum adhu podhum
Neeyum ada naanum onna serndha
Manam sirakadikum
Edhuvum venaa enaku adhu podhum

Vazhiyula marichu
Vizhiyula sirichu
Valaiyathaan virichi pudicha
Neeyum enna vasamaathaan
Manasula nuzhainchu
Nenapula nenanchu
Moochula kalandhu olinja
Neeyum ulla usuraathaan

Kandhalaa irundha en vaazhkaya maathuney
Kandadhum pudichidhu Kaadhala kaatuney
Adichaalum pudichaalum enaku nee venum

Neeyum ada naanum onna serndha
Ver edhuvum enaku venaa
Adhu podhum adhu podhum

Neeyum adi naanum onna serndha

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Neeyum Ada Naanum expresses the joy and playfulness of love, highlighting the connection between two individuals.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Vil Ambu, this song showcases the blossoming relationship between the lead characters, emphasizing their chemistry and shared moments.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of AV Pooja and D Imman.

When was the song released?

Neeyum Ada Naanum was released on September 22, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neeyum Ada Naanum, the playful banter between the singers encapsulates the lightheartedness of young love. The song serves as a backdrop to the romantic escapades of the characters in Vil Ambu, evoking feelings of joy and excitement. Its catchy melody and upbeat rhythm make it a perfect anthem for celebrations and romantic occasions. The lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of love, making it relatable and enjoyable for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeyum Ada Naanum from Vil Ambu is a delightful duet that captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of AV Pooja and D Imman, this song radiates a vibrant energy that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of love through this captivating melody that perfectly blends emotion and rhythm.
stanzaMeanings: What happened? I don't understand anything. Is something troubling you? Do you know about it? I just think and smile when I see you.

When I see you, I can't help but feel. I don't need anything else if we are together. That's enough, that's enough. Just being with you makes my heart feel light. I don't need anything else, that's enough.
I have no experience, no knowledge, no understanding. Love is new to me, I can't grasp it. I want knowledge, I want experience. Will that come?
There is no way to escape it. In my heart, there is only longing. It feels like a dream, and I can't stop smiling. Don't change my mind.
When we are together, I don't need anything else. That's enough, that's enough. Just being with you makes my heart feel light. I don't need anything else, that's enough.
Lost on the path, smiling in the eyes. The trap is set, and you are caught in it. You are my obsession, lingering in my mind. You are intertwined with my breath.
If love is there, my life will change. It has caught me. Even if I hit or get hit, I want you.
When we are together, I don't need anything else. That's enough, that's enough. Just being with you makes my heart feel light. I don't need anything else, that's enough.
